about.title: About
about.subtitle: Discover our open-source e-commerce platform, designed for entrepreneurs and developers worldwide.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Democratize e-commerce by offering a powerful, free, and accessible solution for everyone. We believe every entrepreneur deserves the best tools to succeed online.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Open and transparent source code, developed by the community for the community.

free.title: 100% Free
free.description: No hidden fees, no commissions. Your success belongs entirely to you.

secure.title: Secure
secure.description: Enterprise-grade security with industry best practices.

community.title: Community
community.description: An active community of developers and entrepreneurs helping each other.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of merchants who trust our platform.

home.title: E-commerce Open Source Platform
home.description: 100% free and open source e-commerce platform. Shopify alternative built with Next.js, React and TypeScript.
home.ogDescription: 100% free and open source e-commerce platform

products.description: Discover our complete selection of products

cart.title: My Cart
cart.description: View and manage your shopping cart

resetPassword.ignore: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
